description: AGENT-EUDR-036: EU Information System Interface (EISI) -- Manages all interactions with the EU EUDR Information System including DDS submissions, operator/trader registrations, reference number lifecycle, compliance package transmission, geolocation data quality validation, submission acknowledgement tracking, rejection handling with auto-remediation, audit trail recording, and API health monitoring for EUDR Articles 4, 9, 10, 14-16, 28, 31, 33 compliance

panels.title: Total DDS Submissions
panels.description: Current count of Due Diligence Statement submissions sent to the EU Information System. Tracks total submission volume across all commodities and operator types for Article 4 compliance monitoring.

panels.title: Submission Success Rate
panels.description: Percentage of DDS submissions successfully acknowledged by the EU Information System over the last 24 hours. Target: >= 95% success rate. Below 90% triggers critical alert for connectivity or schema issues.

panels.title: Pending Acknowledgements
panels.description: Current number of DDS submissions awaiting acknowledgement from the EU Information System. Sustained count > 25 indicates connectivity issues or EU IS processing delays requiring investigation.

panels.title: Submissions Over Time
panels.description: Rate of DDS submissions to the EU Information System over time, broken down by submission type: initial, amendment, withdrawal, annual_update. Tracks submission throughput and identifies peak filing periods.

panels.title: Submissions by Commodity
panels.description: Distribution of DDS submissions in the last 24 hours by EUDR commodity: cattle, cocoa, coffee, oil_palm, rubber, soya, wood. Helps identify commodity-level filing volumes and compliance coverage.

panels.title: Submissions by Status
panels.description: Distribution of DDS submissions by lifecycle status in the last 24 hours: pending, transmitted, acknowledged, accepted, rejected, withdrawn. Tracks submission pipeline health.

panels.title: Submission Status Transitions
panels.description: Stacked area chart of submission status transitions over time. Tracks lifecycle flow from pending through transmitted to acknowledged/accepted/rejected. Healthy pattern shows majority transitioning to accepted.

panels.title: Active Operator Registrations
panels.description: Current number of active operator/trader registrations maintained in the EU Information System. Tracks registration lifecycle including new, active, suspended, and revoked statuses per Article 28.

panels.title: Registration Success Rate
panels.description: Percentage of operator/trader registration requests successfully processed by the EU IS over the last 7 days. Target: >= 98%. Failed registrations prevent DDS submission for those operators.

panels.title: Reference Numbers Issued
panels.description: Rate of EUDR reference numbers issued by the EU Information System over time. Each accepted DDS receives a unique reference number per Article 4(2). Tracks reference number issuance throughput.

panels.title: Registrations by Type
panels.description: Distribution of operator/trader registrations by entity type over the last 7 days: operator, trader, sme_operator, authorized_representative. Tracks registration portfolio composition per Articles 4, 5, 6.

panels.title: Registration & Reference Lifecycle
panels.description: Time series of registration events and reference number issuance. Compares new registrations, renewals, suspensions, and reference numbers issued. Healthy pattern shows registrations tracking reference issuance.

panels.title: EU IS API Availability
panels.description: Uptime percentage of the EU Information System API endpoints as observed from GreenLang health checks over the last 24 hours. Target: >= 99.5%. Below 99% triggers critical alert for EU IS outage escalation.

panels.title: EU IS Response Time
panels.description: Average response time from the EU Information System API for health check probes over time. Tracks EU IS performance from GreenLang's perspective. Spikes indicate EU IS degradation or network issues.

panels.title: Connection Pool Status
panels.description: Current state of the EU IS connection pool: active connections, idle connections, and pool utilization percentage. High utilization (> 85%) indicates connection pressure requiring pool scaling.

panels.title: Rate Limit & Throttle Events
panels.description: Rate of EU IS rate-limiting (429) and throttle events encountered by GreenLang's EISI agent. Tracks API quota consumption and helps tune submission batching to avoid EU IS rate limits.

panels.title: Active Rejections
panels.description: Current number of DDS submissions rejected by the EU Information System requiring amendment and resubmission. Non-zero triggers warning alert. > 10 triggers critical requiring compliance lead escalation.

panels.title: Rejections by Reason
panels.description: Top rejection reasons from the EU Information System in the last 7 days: schema_validation, missing_geolocation, invalid_reference, incomplete_article9, data_inconsistency, format_error, expired_registration, duplicate_submission.

panels.title: Auto-Remediation Rate
panels.description: Percentage of rejected submissions automatically remediated and resubmitted by the EISI agent over the last 7 days. Target: >= 70% auto-remediation. Remaining rejections require manual intervention.

panels.title: Rejection & Remediation Timeline
panels.description: Time series of rejection events vs auto-remediation completions. Gap between rejections and remediations indicates growing manual intervention backlog. Includes resubmission rate for tracking recovery velocity.

panels.title: Packages Assembled
panels.description: Rate of compliance packages assembled for EU IS transmission over time by commodity. Each package bundles DDS, Article 9 data, risk assessment summary, geolocation evidence, and supporting certifications.

panels.title: Package Completeness Score
panels.description: Average completeness score of assembled packages before EU IS transmission. Score measures presence of all required Article 9 elements, geolocation data, risk documentation, and supporting evidence. Target: >= 95%.

panels.title: Package Validation Results
panels.description: Distribution of pre-submission package validation results in the last 24 hours: passed (all checks green), warnings (non-blocking issues), failed (blocking errors preventing submission). Tracks data quality gate effectiveness.

panels.title: Geolocation Compliance Rate
panels.description: Percentage of submitted geolocation data points meeting EU IS precision requirements (Article 9(1)(d)). Requires polygon boundaries for plots > 4 hectares and point coordinates for smaller plots. Target: >= 98%.

panels.title: Geolocation Validation Issues
panels.description: Top geolocation validation issues detected during pre-submission checks in the last 7 days: insufficient_precision, missing_polygon, invalid_coordinates, self_intersecting_polygon, out_of_bounds, topology_error, datum_mismatch.

panels.title: Geolocation Quality Over Time
panels.description: Time series of geolocation quality metrics: compliance rate, average coordinate precision, and polygon validity rate. Tracks improvements in upstream data quality feeding into EU IS submissions.

panels.title: Audit Events by Category
panels.description: Distribution of audit trail events recorded over the last 24 hours by category: submission, registration, reference_number, rejection, remediation, package_assembly, geolocation_check, api_call, authentication, authorization.

panels.title: Audit Events Over Time
panels.description: Rate of audit trail events over time by category. All EU IS interactions are logged for Article 31 (5-year retention) and Article 33 (competent authority access). Spikes indicate batch operations or incident response activity.

panels.title: Retention & Compliance Metrics
panels.description: Key audit trail retention metrics. Total records under 5-year Article 31 retention, integrity check pass rate (SHA-256 hashes verified), and records accessible for competent authority requests per Article 33.

panels.title: Audit Integrity Check Rate
panels.description: Percentage of audit trail records passing SHA-256 integrity verification in the last 24 hours. Target: 100%. Any failure indicates potential data tampering or storage corruption requiring immediate investigation.

panels.title: API Request Latency (p50/p95/p99)
panels.description: Latency percentiles for all /v1/eudr-eisi API endpoints. Covers submission, registration, package assembly, validation, and reference number queries. Target: p99 < 3 seconds.

panels.title: EU IS Submission Latency (p50/p95/p99)
panels.description: End-to-end latency for DDS submission to the EU Information System including payload serialization, TLS handshake, transmission, and acknowledgement receipt. Target: p99 < 15 seconds.

panels.title: Package Assembly Latency (p50/p95/p99)
panels.description: Latency for compliance package assembly including Article 9 data collection, geolocation bundling, risk summary embedding, evidence linking, and schema validation. Target: p99 < 10 seconds.

panels.title: API Errors
panels.description: Rate of API errors (4xx and 5xx) across all /v1/eudr-eisi endpoints. Sustained 5xx error rate > 1% triggers critical alert. 4xx errors may indicate client-side integration issues.

panels.title: Processing Time by Operation
panels.description: Average processing time for key EISI operations: submission_prepare, submission_transmit, registration_create, registration_renew, package_assemble, package_validate, geolocation_check, reference_lookup, rejection_analyze, auto_remediate.

panels.title: Alert Rules Reference
panels.description: Summary of all alert rules for the EU Information System Interface agent with conditions, severity, and notification channels.

options.content:
## EUDR-036 EU Information System Interface Alert Rules

| # | Alert | Condition | Severity | Evaluation | Action |
|---|-------|-----------|----------|------------|--------|
| 1 | **Submission Success Rate Drop** | Success rate < 95% for 1h | Warning | Every 5m, for 15m | Review submission errors, check EU IS connectivity |
| 2 | **Critical Submission Failures** | Success rate < 80% for 30m | Critical | Every 5m, for 5m | Page on-call, activate EU IS incident response |
| 3 | **Pending Acknowledgement Backlog** | Pending acknowledgements > 25 for 2h | Warning | Every 15m, for 1h | Check EU IS status, review submission queue |
| 4 | **Active Rejections** | Active rejections > 0 for 1h | Warning | Every 5m, for 15m | Review rejection reasons, trigger remediation |
| 5 | **Critical Rejection Volume** | Active rejections > 10 for 30m | Critical | Every 5m, for 5m | Page compliance lead, activate emergency amendment workflow |
| 6 | **EU IS Availability Drop** | EU IS availability < 99% for 30m | Warning | Every 5m, for 10m | Check EU IS status page, prepare for degraded mode |
| 7 | **EU IS Outage** | EU IS availability < 95% for 15m | Critical | Every 1m, for 5m | Page on-call, activate submission queue buffering |
| 8 | **Rate Limit Exceeded** | Rate limit events > 10 in 15m | Warning | Every 5m, for 10m | Reduce submission batch size, enable adaptive throttling |
| 9 | **Geolocation Compliance Drop** | Geolocation compliance < 95% for 4h | Warning | Every 15m, for 1h | Review upstream geolocation data quality |
| 10 | **Audit Integrity Failure** | Integrity check failure detected | Critical | Every 1m, for 1m | Page security on-call, isolate affected records |
| 11 | **High API Error Rate** | API 5xx error rate > 1% for 5 minutes | Critical | Every 1m, for 5m | Page on-call, check infrastructure |
| 12 | **Submission Latency Degradation** | p99 submission latency > 15s for 10m | Warning | Every 5m, for 10m | Investigate EU IS performance, check network |
| 13 | **Low Auto-Remediation Rate** | Auto-remediation rate < 50% for 7d | Warning | Every 6h, for 24h | Review remediation rules, update templates |
| 14 | **Registration Failure** | Registration success rate < 95% for 24h | Warning | Every 1h, for 4h | Investigate registration API, check data quality |

### Notification Channels
- **Critical**: PagerDuty + Slack #eudr-critical + Email compliance-lead + Email eu-is-liaison
- **Warning**: Slack #eudr-alerts + Email on-call

### Runbook Links
- [Submission Failure Response](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/eisi/submission-failure)
- [EU IS Outage Handling](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/eisi/eu-is-outage)
- [Rejection Remediation](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/eisi/rejection-remediation)
- [Rate Limit Mitigation](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/eisi/rate-limit)
- [Geolocation Quality Resolution](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/eisi/geolocation-quality)
- [Audit Integrity Investigation](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/eisi/audit-integrity)
- [Registration Troubleshooting](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/eisi/registration-issues)
- [Performance Degradation](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/eisi/perf-degradation)
- [Acknowledgement Backlog](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/eisi/ack-backlog)
- [Auto-Remediation Tuning](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/eisi/auto-remediation)
